label: The Antistatic Vault
description: The Antistatic Vault occupies a sealed back chamber of the Prismwright Exchange, lined with vitrified basalt panels scored into a rectilinear grid that matches Seamline Concord’s navigational sightlines. Stepped shelving and lens-crates sit within grounded metal frames, their edges fitted with finned dissipation strips that bleed Lacrymara’s charged glass dust into the floor’s buried conductors. Narrow caged light-slits admit attenuated copper-white radiance, which breaks into disciplined bands across mirror-slag placards used for inventory and calibration reference. The air remains dry and faintly ozonated, and every surface bears a persistent, muted grit of electrostatically pinned dust kept from the stored optics by strict shielding and spacing.
